title: crotalaria deserticola subsp. orientalis
intro: Crotalaria deserticola subsp. orientalis, also known as the Desert Crotalaria, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Crotalaria deserticola subsp. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a valuable resource for local communities.
